label: hobbies_and_activities
value: Enjoys hosting board game nights with over ten people, preferring party games over strategy games. Interested in finding more ideas for party games and homemade versions that might be cheaper and just as fun.

label: professional_details
value: Leading an IoT sensor integration project at work aimed at improving safety protocols; experimenting with different technologies within a generous budget; seeking advice on presenting project findings to the management team, including strategies to address common challenges such as technical jargon, cost justification, security concerns, scalability, data privacy, implementation timeline and risks, user adoption and training, vendor reliability and support, integration with existing systems, and regulatory compliance.

label: plans_and_intentions
value: Planning another board game night soon, focusing on party games that can keep a big crowd entertained.

label: health_and_wellness_preferences
value: Doing yoga and joined a running club to manage stress. Interested in other physical activities to unwind after a tough day, such as cycling, swimming, hiking, Pilates, Tai Chi, gardening, dance classes, rock climbing, kayaking or paddleboarding, and team sports.

label: activity_and_service_preferences
value: Interested in apps and tools to track progress and set goals for physical activities, including Strava, MyFitnessPal, Fitbit App, Yoga Wake Up, Couch to 5K, 7 Minute Workout, Forest, Headspace, Garmin Connect, Trello, Google Fit, MapMyRun/MapMyRide.
